description: Examples demonstrating action failure semantics — onFailure overrides and failureFeedback

examples.note: Navigate with default failure behavior (halt) — onFailure absent, client applies default
Navigate with explicit halt and server-provided error message

failureFeedback.message: This game is not available yet

examples.note: Navigate overridden to continue — useful for optional deep links that should not block the sequence
Refresh with default failure behavior (continue) — shows stale indicator
Refresh overridden to halt — critical live-game section where stale data is unacceptable
Multi-action sequence: fireAndForget → navigate (demonstrates fire-and-forget-before-navigation pattern)
